arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about winning the Champions League, injuries, Duran, Watkins & Monaco
arts.sum: How we are playing this competition is the most important thing, trying to enjoy each moment; trying to focus on each match; trying to show our capacity and how we can face the best teams in the world. The Champions League is against the best teams in the world and tomorrow we are playing an experienced French club."

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Levante defender Andres Garcia completes move to Premier League
arts.sum: Aston Villa formally announce that they have completed the signing of Levante defender Andres Garcia.

arts.ttl: Manager 'really rates' Emiliano Buendia amid Aston Villa transfer links
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke says that Emiliano Buendia is a player who he 'really rates' - but he wouldn't drawn on the immediate future of the Aston Villa playmaker during this January transfer window. Farke worked with Buendia during their days together at Norwich City and he helped mould the player who would eventually cost Villa £33m in the summer of 2021.

arts.ttl: Barry, Duran, pair missing, injury absentees - Aston Villa train before Monaco clash - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: It was a youthful group which Unai Emery oversaw and put through their paces; there remain a number of senior players absent through various injuries and that has meant one or two players from the under 21s joining in training with the first team. Jhon Duran trained as normal ahead of Villa's seventh Champions League fixture of the campaign; the Colombian has been the subject of interest from West Ham United in this January transfer window, but - as he aims to fight his way back into the starting XI which he has dropped out of since Boxing Day - the focus remains on the task at hand.

arts.ttl: Drama as flight to seal Aston Villa exit cancelled – Scraping around for other plans
arts.sum: At the weekend, Fotomaç reported Aston Villa’s Diego Carlos has accepted a €4m per year offer from Fenerbahçe. On Monday, we covered claims from Turkey that the defender is set to carry out medical tests in Istanbul after José Mourinho’s side agreed a deal with the Villans. arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Aston Villa complete Andres Garcia transfer
arts.sum: Young right-back Andres Garcia has joined the club from Spanish second-tier outfit Levante for €7 million. Aston Villa have officially completed the signing of Andres Garcia .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sign Levante right-back Garcia
arts.sum: Aston Villa make their second signing of the January transfer window by completing a deal for Levante defender Andres Garcia.

arts.ttl: Every word Ezri Konsa said about Mings partnership, 'surreal' England moment and Champions League dream
arts.sum: I waited patiently and I always wanted to play Champions League football as a little kid so to finally do it now, this is a dream come true." I don’t think we have lost a game since I’ve played alongside him so to have him back, it’s a great feeling.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Aston Villa complete second January transfer as defender signs on
arts.sum: Aston Villa have completed the signing of right-back Andres Garcia from Levante. Bade signed a long-term deal with the Spanish club last year, but Sevilla are open to selling him for the right price.

arts.ttl: Monaco vs Aston Villa Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: Aston Villa make the trip to Monaco tonight to kick off the penultimate round of Champions League matches. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-...
